positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a mystical celestial fox (kitsune) sitting gracefully among bioluminescent jungle foliage. The fox has nine elegant, fluffy tails and glowing, ethereal eyes. The overall scene should have a strong silhouette against a deep, cosmic indigo background, punctuated by vibrant bursts of teal, neon yellow, and magenta. The composition must be centered, with the fox positioned dynamically to maximize visual impact on apparel. Details should include glowing spores, intricate root systems, and constellations visible through the leaves. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau Japanese woodblock print meets modern digital glow-art. Composition: Symmetrical and highly decorative. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting, emphasizing the glowing elements and the sharp outline of the subject.
